use_cases: Displaying loading state during data fetching operations
Showing progress indicator during page transitions
Indicating background processing in async workflows
Providing visual feedback during form submissions
Loading state for API calls in dashboards and admin panels
ai_summary: A compact ripple-pulse loader component featuring a central logo surrounded by animated pulsing boxes that create a wave-like effect. Designed to indicate ongoing activity or loading states with a clean, professional aesthetic suitable for various web applications.
